name: Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book / 小红书 / RedNote) — China's leading lifestyle social platform combining Instagram-style content sharing with e-commerce. Enables AI agents to search notes, browse homepage recommendations, view note content and comments, and post comments — supporting Chinese social media marketing and research workflows.
use_cases: Searching Xiaohongshu for trending content and notes from market research agents
Monitoring homepage recommendations for Chinese lifestyle and beauty trends
Analyzing note content and engagement from competitive intelligence agents
Building Chinese social media monitoring workflows for brands on XHS
not_for: Non-Chinese market research (Xiaohongshu focuses on Chinese consumers)
Teams without Chinese language capability (content primarily in Mandarin)
best_when: A brand, marketer, or researcher targeting Chinese consumers wants AI agents to monitor Xiaohongshu trends, search content, and track engagement in China's leading lifestyle social platform.
avoid_when: You're not targeting Chinese markets or can't process Mandarin Chinese content. Xiaohongshu is very focused on Chinese lifestyle consumers.

auth.notes: Xiaohongshu account credentials required. Uses unofficial API/web scraping — verify ToS compliance. Account may be rate-limited or suspended for automated access.

pricing.notes: Free open source. Requires Xiaohongshu account. Uses unofficial API — use responsibly.

performance.rate_limits: XHS unofficial API rate limits apply; aggressive use may trigger account restrictions

known_agent_gotchas: Uses unofficial XHS API — prone to breaking when XHS updates their platform
XHS ToS compliance uncertain for automated access — review before production use
Account may be restricted or banned for aggressive automated access
Content primarily in Simplified Chinese — Chinese language processing required
Data residency in China — review compliance requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Unofficial API usage. XHS account credentials must be secured. ToS compliance required. Data processed through Xiaohongshu (Chinese platform).

security_score_components.security_notes: Unofficial API. Account credentials security. ToS compliance uncertain. Chinese platform data residency.
